Onboarding.checklistDescription: Follow these steps to get the most out of Veta.

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.line2: Veta was built with care and dedication. I hope you enjoy it.
welcome.line3: Now let's complete a few initial setup steps...

config.title: Set up account and customization
config.description: Complete your profile, default currency, and tax rate to use Veta comfortably.

client.title: Add a client
client.description: Create your first client to link it to projects.

project.title: Create a project
project.description: Create your first project to organize spaces and budgets.

publicProfile.title: Public name and public email
publicProfile.description: Set how your name and email should appear on budget PDFs.
